0.text: Diffuse mosaic attenuation pattern in both lungs

1.text: Calcific pulmonary nodule measuring approximately 8 mm in diameter in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Surrounding fibrotic retraction around the calcific pulmonary nodule in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibrotic bands in the right lower lobe laterobasal segment

4.text: Pleuroparenchymal fibrotic bands in the left lung lingular segment
